ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] justlovemaki/AIClient2API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/justlovemaki/AIClient2API
Language: javascript
Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Codex, Grok, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [svelte] mak-kirkland/chronicler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mak-kirkland/chronicler
Language: svelte
Chronicler is a free, offline worldbuilding tool and local wiki for writers, game masters, and tabletop RPG creators. It saves your notes as plain Markdown files on your computer. No sign-up, no subscription, no cloud. Your world stays on your device.
